metadata.name: Emergency Sourcing of Critical Raw Material

description: A key supplier has declared force majeure, and a critical raw material must be sourced from an alternative, approved supplier to prevent a production shutdown.

nodes.task_description: Identify current inventory of the critical raw material and calculate the run-out time.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly determines the number of production days remaining.

nodes.task_description: Query the vendor management system for all approved, secondary suppliers for the material.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a list of at least two alternative suppliers.

nodes.task_description: Contact the top alternative supplier, confirm available stock and lead time, and issue an emergency purchase order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully places a purchase order to cover the production gap.
